mainEntity.name: Can I get comp if forklift accident during break in Sandy UT?
mainEntity.text: Can I get comp if forklift accident during break in Sandy UT?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes if on premises and injury arises from/employment. 'Premises rule' covers breaks.

suggestedAnswer.text: Sandy warehouses broad lots qualify. Prove via time clock, CCTV. Insurers argue deviation—witnesses key.

name: Comp During Break Forklift Injury Sandy UT
description: Yes if on premises and injury arises from/employment. 'Premises rule' covers breaks.
